name: Tencent TokenHub
description: Registers Tencent TokenHub / Hunyuan as a first-party OpenAI-compatible chat provider using a Plugin Setting or Tencent API key environment variable.

env.description: Fallback Tencent TokenHub API key used when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Alternative Tencent MaaS API key used when no api_key Plugin Setting or TENCENT_TOKENHUB_API_KEY is configured.
Legacy Tencent Hunyuan API key fallback for TokenHub-compatible accounts.

settings.label: Tencent TokenHub API key
settings.description: Tencent TokenHub API key used for Hunyuan inference. Falls back to TENCENT_TOKENHUB_API_KEY, TENCENT_MAAS_API_KEY, or HUNYUAN_API_KEY.

settings.label: TokenHub endpoint region
settings.description: Fixed official TokenHub endpoint to expose through Pi. Use Singapore for international accounts unless Tencent documentation for your account says otherwise.

providers.name: Tencent TokenHub
providers.description: Runs Tencent TokenHub / Hunyuan chat models through Pi's OpenAI-compatible completions transport.
